recommendations.title: Shrek
recommendations.overview: It ain't easy bein' green -- especially if you're a likable (albeit smelly) ogre named Shrek. On a mission to retrieve a gorgeous princess from the clutches of a fire-breathing dragon, Shrek teams up with an unlikely compatriot -- a wisecracking donk

recommendations.title: Shrek in the Swamp Karaoke Dance Party
recommendations.overview: Shrek and his friends enjoy themselves with some Karaoke partying.

recommendations.title: Spirit: Stallion of the Cimarron
recommendations.overview: A captured mustang remains determined to return to his herd no matter what.

recommendations.title: The Addams Family 2
recommendations.overview: The Addams get tangled up in more wacky adventures and find themselves involved in hilarious run-ins with all sorts of unsuspecting characters.

recommendations.title: Cirque du Soleil: Worlds Away
recommendations.overview: An original story featuring performances by Cirque du Soleil. A young woman is entranced by an Aerialist. When they fall into the dreamlike world of Cirque du Soleil and are separated, they travel through the different tent worlds trying to find each

recommendations.title: UglyDolls
recommendations.overview: In the adorably different town of Uglyville, weirdness is celebrated, strangeness is special and beauty is embraced as more than meets the eye. After traveling to the other side of a mountain, Moxy and her UglyDoll friends discover Perfection -- a to

recommendations.title: Smurfs: The Lost Village
recommendations.overview: In this fully animated, all-new take on the Smurfs, a mysterious map sets Smurfette and her friends Brainy, Clumsy and Hefty on an exciting race through the Forbidden Forest leading to the discovery of the biggest secret in Smurf history.

recommendations.title: The Chronicles of Narnia: The Lion, the Witch and the Wardrobe

recommendations.title: Far Far Away Idol
recommendations.overview: Shrek, Fiona, Donkey, Puss in Boots, and the rest of the Far Far Away Kingdom battle it out in a singing competition.

recommendations.title: The Chronicles of Narnia: Prince Caspian
